title: KNRFarm
description: Cloud-native Android application managing farm lifecycle, inventory, and financial records. Features real-time Firestore sync with sub-second consistency, RBAC authentication, and predictive workflows that reduced missed events by 95%.

title: AI-Powered FAQ Bot
description: Intelligent chatbot generating contextual responses using OpenAI APIs. Built with React for a performant, modular frontend architecture.

title: Blogging App
description: Full-stack blogging platform with RESTful APIs, MongoDB persistence, and clean separation of business logic and presentation layers.

title: Bluestock Fintech Dashboard
description: Real-time financial data pipeline processing reports for 100+ Nifty 100 companies. Includes rule-based ML engine for investment insights (CAGR, ROE), optimized MySQL schema with UPSERT logic, and a React + Redux visualization dashboard.
